title: not so inv
description: changes the inv particles for something more sus
body:
This texture pack changes ur inv particles to mini among us so u can spot invisible players near you

This texture pack can get u banned if considered cheats

before use check with the server owner to see if u can use it, its not my fault if u get banned 
this texture pack is (in my opinion) an pvp\qol\smp texture pack

mension me if u use it on youtube, i probably will see it

never in any circunstance use this was made by u 
tysm for the suport

made with a smile by:neqinmc

[YOUTUBE HERE :D](https://www.youtube.com/@neqinmc)
